title: Senior Doctor - Cipla Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Cipla Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Cipla Global Group are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cipla Global Group:
Cipla Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
